Class HW5_5_Sulpizio

java.lang.Object
HW5_5_Sulpizio
public class HW5_5_Sulpizio extends Object
Project: HW 5 Purpose Details: javaBruteForceFreqAnalysis using Arabic Course: IST 242 Author: Matthew Sulpizio Date Developed: 4/10/2026 Last Date Changed: 4/14/2026 Rev:

  • Constructor Details

    • HW5_5_Sulpizio

      public HW5_5_Sulpizio()
      Default constructor for the HW5_5_Sulpizio class.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The main method for program execution.
      Parameters:
      args - The command-line arguments.

    • translateToArabic

      public static String translateToArabic(String text, String apiKey) throws Exception
      Translates English plaintext to Arabic using the Google Translate API.
      Parameters:
      text - The plaintext message entered by the user.
      apiKey - The Google API key entered by the user.
      Returns:
      The Arabic translated text.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the API request fails or the response cannot be parsed.

    • extractTranslatedText

      public static String extractTranslatedText(String json)
      Extracts the translated text from the JSON response.
      Parameters:
      json - The raw JSON response.
      Returns:
      The extracted translated text, or null if not found.

    • escapeJson

      public static String escapeJson(String text)
      Escapes quotation marks and backslashes for JSON safety.
      Parameters:
      text - The input text.
      Returns:
      The escaped text.

    • decodeBasicEntities

      public static String decodeBasicEntities(String text)
      Decodes a few basic encoded entities that may appear in the API response.
      Parameters:
      text - The encoded text.
      Returns:
      The decoded text.

    • encryptArabic

      public static String encryptArabic(String text, int shift)
      Encrypts Arabic text using a Caesar cipher.
      Parameters:
      text - The Arabic text to encrypt.
      shift - The shift amount.
      Returns:
      The encrypted Arabic text.

    • decryptArabic

      public static String decryptArabic(String text, int shift)
      Decrypts Arabic text using a Caesar cipher.
      Parameters:
      text - The Arabic text to decrypt.
      shift - The shift amount.
      Returns:
      The decrypted Arabic text.

    • frequencyAnalysis

      public static HW5_5_Sulpizio.Result frequencyAnalysis(String cipher)
      Performs brute-force frequency analysis on Arabic ciphertext.
      Parameters:
      cipher - The encrypted Arabic text.
      Returns:
      The best detected shift and decrypted text guess.

    • chiSquare

      public static double chiSquare(String text)
      Calculates the chi-square value for a given Arabic text sample.
      Parameters:
      text - The Arabic text to analyze.
      Returns:
      The chi-square score.
